What does this PR do?

## Type of Change

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass (`npm test`)
- [ ] Dist tests pass (`npm run test:dist`)
- [ ] Typecheck passes (`npm run typecheck`)
- [ ] Example snippets typecheck (`npm run typecheck:examples`)
- [ ] Linting passes (`npm run lint`)
- [ ] Build succeeds (`npm run build`)
- [ ] New code has tests
- [ ] README updated (if applicable)
